subcodes.first_line: O enkindled lamp of the love of God! This is the day of trust and the hour of supplication; 'tis the time of fervent ardour and passionate yearning [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای شمع افروخته محبت الله الیوم وقت توکل است و هنگام توسل زمان جوش و خروش است
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @meditation, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @words vs deeds
